text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 01 = Legally Married (to opposite sex), spouse present 
02 = Legally Married (to opposite sex), spouse absent 
03 = Legally Married (to same sex), spouse present 
04 = Legally Married (to same sex), spouse absent 
05 = Partnered or in Civil Union (to opposite sex), spouse present 
06 = Partnered or in Civil Union (to opposite sex), spouse absent 
07 = Partnered or in Civil Union
